description: Preprocess a Neuropixels recording: bandpass filter (FREQ_MIN-FREQ_MAX), phase-shift ADC correction, bad-channel detection + removal, common-median reference, then save the preprocessed recording and probe.json under record_store.
rules: writes the preprocessed recording into record_store/preprocessed/
captures the run log to record_store/preprocess_report.txt
degrades gracefully (still writes the report, exit 0) when spikeinterface is absent
usage: Set DATA_PATH (input recording dir); optional FORMAT (default auto), STREAM_NAME (default imec0.ap), FREQ_MIN (default 300), FREQ_MAX (default 6000). Output: preprocess_report.txt + preprocessed/.
limitation: Requires spikeinterface (+ probeinterface). Writes only to record_store; does not mutate the source recording.
